title: Course Registration Hold
transcript: Student: Hi, I'm trying to register for classes for next semester, but the system says I have a hold on my account. Can you help me figure out why? Registrar: Sure, let me pull up your account. What's your student ID? Student: It's 445-2091. Registrar: I see. You have a hold because you haven't submitted your final transcript from your previous institution. Student: But I already ordered it to be sent here last month. Registrar: Sometimes it takes a while for the records office to process. Let me check... Actually, it arrived yesterday but hasn't been logged into the system yet. Student: So will I be able to register once it's logged? Registrar: Yes, I can expedite this for you. I'll process it now, and the hold should be removed within a few hours. Student: That's a relief. Also, I wanted to ask about an override for Biology 201. It says I don't meet the prerequisite. Registrar: Let me check. You took Chemistry 101, but the prerequisite is Biology 101 or equivalent AP credit. Do you have AP Biology? Student: I scored a 4 on the AP Biology exam in high school. Registrar: That qualifies. You'll need to submit your AP score report to the registrar's office, and then we can apply the override. Student: Great, I'll do that today. Thank you for your help.

questions.stem: Why does the student visit the registrar's office?
options: To change her major to biology
To resolve a registration hold and a prerequisite issue
To appeal a grade from last semester
To request a transcript for a job application
questions.explanation: The student has a hold preventing registration and also needs an override for a prerequisite, so she visits the registrar for help with both issues.

questions.stem: How does the student qualify for the Biology 201 prerequisite?
options: She earned a score of 4 on the AP Biology exam
She took a summer biology course
questions.explanation: The student scored a 4 on the AP Biology exam in high school, which qualifies as meeting the prerequisite for Biology 201.

audioSegments.text: Hi, I'm trying to register for classes for next semester, but the system says I have a hold on my account. Can you help me figure out why?
Sure, let me pull up your account. What's your student ID?
I see. You have a hold because you haven't submitted your final transcript from your previous institution.
But I already ordered it to be sent here last month.
Sometimes it takes a while for the records office to process. Let me check... Actually, it arrived yesterday but hasn't been logged into the system yet.
So will I be able to register once it's logged?
Yes, I can expedite this for you. I'll process it now, and the hold should be removed within a few hours.
That's a relief. Also, I wanted to ask about an override for Biology 201. It says I don't meet the prerequisite.
Let me check. You took Chemistry 101, but the prerequisite is Biology 101 or equivalent AP credit. Do you have AP Biology?
I scored a 4 on the AP Biology exam in high school.
That qualifies. You'll need to submit your AP score report to the registrar's office, and then we can apply the override.
Great, I'll do that today. Thank you for your help.
